message:
feat(storage,test): storage deferred-refresh refinements, concurrency test expansion, doctor/import fixes

- Refine SQLite storage deferred blocked-cache refresh path with
  additional edge case handling
- Expand e2e concurrency tests with additional multi-agent contention
  scenarios validating the deferred cache refresh under parallel mutations
- Simplify doctor command diagnostic output
- Fix markdown import test expectations
- Update Cargo.lock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
